case_title: RegimA Revenue Hijacking & Trust Capture — Enhanced with Mailbox Evidence

agents.name: Jacqueline Faucitt
agents.alternative_explanation: Legitimate business operator whose infrastructure was hijacked

agents.name: Kent Gillham
agents.alternative_explanation: May have been following instructions without full knowledge of fraud

agents.role: Accountant, FFT Trustee, George Group CFO

agents.role: Sales/Accounts, executed bank change letters June 2025

material_facts.description: Systematic fraud was occurring in the RegimA group companies
material_facts.significance: Awareness of fraud establishes mens rea for all subsequent concealment acts

material_facts.description: Rynette operated Sage accounting under Peter's identity (pete@regima.com)
material_facts.significance: Identity fraud to process financial data unlawfully; proven by mailbox metadata showing Sage notifications to rynette@regima.zone

material_facts.description: Revenue was being diverted from RegimA SA to other accounts
material_facts.significance: Core financial crime — R8.5M annual revenue hijacking

material_facts.description: 2019 financial statements were fabricated in June 2025
material_facts.significance: Tax fraud and creation of false paper trail

material_facts.description: Exchange Control Regulations were being violated
Sage subscription was deliberately expired to deny access to financial records
material_facts.significance: Destruction of evidence — Rynette controlled the subscription

material_facts.description: Rynette filed a false perjury complaint as counter-strategy
material_facts.significance: Abuse of criminal process to intimidate legitimate complainant

material_facts.description: Bantjies had insider access to both Ketoni Investment Holdings and the FFT
material_facts.significance: Dual-control loop over R18.685M transaction — proven by mailbox showing Bantjies at thegeorgegroup.co.za discussing Ketoni

material_facts.description: Bantjies swore a false affidavit in court
material_facts.significance: Perjury — sworn false testimony to support fraudulent interdict

material_facts.description: Bantjies had access to RegimA bank statements and financial year-end data from at least July 2020
material_facts.significance: NEW MAILBOX EVIDENCE: Bantjies received bank statements and financial year-end documents 4 years before his July 2024 FFT appointment, proving long-standing financial access

material_facts.description: Email diversion was used to control information flow — Bernadine's emails diverted to Rynette in August 2020
material_facts.significance: NEW MAILBOX EVIDENCE: Jacqueline ordered email diversion on 2020-08-29, showing early infrastructure control patterns

material_facts.description: Systematic bank detail change campaign executed in June 2025 to redirect payments from FNB to Absa
material_facts.significance: NEW MAILBOX EVIDENCE: Linda sent 39+ 'Change of Bank' emails in June 2025, redirecting customer payments to new accounts

material_facts.description: Email domain change from @regima.zone to new addresses announced June 2025
material_facts.significance: NEW MAILBOX EVIDENCE: Gayane sent 'Important Update: Change of Email Address' on 2025-06-20, announcing abandonment of regima.zone domain

material_facts.description: Rynette controlled all financial communications — 5,775 financial emails sent from her account
material_facts.significance: NEW MAILBOX EVIDENCE: Rynette was the primary financial controller with 19,025 total emails and 5,775 financial-specific emails spanning 2020-2025

material_facts.description: Bantjies discussed Ketoni Investment Holdings from his George Group email in May-June 2023
material_facts.significance: NEW MAILBOX EVIDENCE: danieb@thegeorgegroup.co.za exchanged emails about Ketoni Investment Holdings, proving insider knowledge through his George Group position

material_facts.description: Rynette instructed customers to change banking details on their apps in May 2025
material_facts.significance: NEW MAILBOX EVIDENCE: Rynette sent 'Banking details and email address for POP' on 2025-05-05 and 'Second request to change the email address on your banking app' on 2025-05-16

material_facts.description: Jacqueline detected possible fraud in February 2021 — two transactions with same reference number
material_facts.significance: NEW MAILBOX EVIDENCE: Jacqueline sent 'POSSIBLE FRAUD 2 TRANSACTIONS WITH THE SAME REFERENCE NUMBER' to FNB on 2021-02-21, proving early awareness of financial irregularities

material_facts.description: Bantjies was involved in Faucitt Family Trust agreement discussions in January 2025
material_facts.significance: NEW MAILBOX EVIDENCE: Bantjies emailed about 'Faucitt family trust - agreement' on 2025-01-29, proving active trust manipulation

knowledge_events.description: Peter wrote to FNB acknowledging 'suspected fraud' in the company accounts.
Sage system records show Rynette logged in as pete@regima.com — Peter authorized this access.
Peter admitted in FNB letter: 'our company may be transgressing the Exchange Control Regulations'.
NEW: Mailbox shows Sage accounting notifications sent to rynette@regima.zone from 2020-05-18, proving she operated the system from the earliest available records.
Rynette emailed De Novo instructing the creation of backdated 2019 financial statements.
Rynette, as subscription owner, let Sage expire to deny access to financial records.
NEW: Mailbox analysis reveals 5,775 financial emails from rynette@regima.zone spanning 2020-2025, establishing her as the sole financial controller.
NEW: Rynette sent 'Banking details and email address for POP' on 2025-05-05, initiating the payment redirection campaign.
NEW: Rynette sent 'Second request to change the email address on your banking app' on 2025-05-16, proving persistent redirection effort.
NEW: Bantjies (danie.bantjes@gmail.com) received RegimA bank statements and financial year-end documents on 2020-07-27, proving financial access 4 years before FFT appointment.
NEW: Bantjies (danieb@thegeorgegroup.co.za) exchanged emails about Ketoni Investment Holdings on 2023-05-31, proving insider knowledge through his George Group CFO position.
NEW: Bantjies emailed about 'Faucitt family trust - agreement' on 2025-01-29, proving active trust manipulation before the fraud execution phase.
Bantjies swore a false supporting affidavit for the interdict application.
Bantjies accepted FFT Trustee appointment while serving as George Group CFO, creating dual-control loop over R18.685M.
NEW: Jacqueline sent 'POSSIBLE FRAUD 2 TRANSACTIONS WITH THE SAME REFERENCE NUMBER' to FNB on 2021-02-21, proving she detected financial irregularities early.
NEW: Jacqueline sent 'DIVERT BERNADINE'S E-MAILS TO RYNETTE' on 2020-08-29. Context: This may have been a legitimate operational request, but it enabled Rynette's information control.
NEW: Linda sent 39+ 'Change of Bank' emails on 2025-06-18, executing the mass payment redirection from FNB to Absa.
NEW: Gayane sent 'Important Update: Change of Email Address' on 2025-06-20, announcing abandonment of @regima.zone domain — infrastructure hijacking.
NEW: Rynette was the beneficiary of the email diversion — Bernadine's emails were diverted to her, giving her control over financial communications.
NEW: Rynette orchestrated the email domain change — Gayane's announcement was on her instruction as the operational controller.
NEW: Kim (customer) confirmed to Linda that the bank change was 'from FNB to Absa' and that Kent received a POP paid into FNB — Kent was aware of the bank change.
NEW: Bantjies received 'RegimA Worldwide - Financial Year End - Feb 2020' documents on 2020-07-27, giving him full visibility into the company's financial position from 2020.
Rynette deleted Shopify audit trails on 22 May 2025, proving knowledge of the revenue diversion.
